name: Chicken Lucia
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
14 oz Can artichoke hearts; drain and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flour with salt and pepper and dredge chicken in flour mixture.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic when hot.
3. When garlic is fragrant, add chicken to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with oregano and cook for another minute or two.
5. Add artichoke hearts, lemon juice, and water. Stir gently.
6. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat until the chicken is cooked through (internal temperature reaches 165°F/74°C), about 5-10 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in chopped parsley. Serve hot.
